features.name: queue as class member
features.description: Code should include a queue type (e.g., integer q[$]) declared as a member variable inside a class definition

features.name: queue method call through object property
features.description: Code should include calling a queue method (push_back, pop_front) via an object.property chain like a.q.push_back(value)

features.name: queue inside class with method nesting
features.description: Code should include a class containing a queue member with method call chaining on that queue member from outside the class
